args.content: Fast-track fix completed. Root cause confirmed in sidepanel current-run in-memory runEvents append path: replayed SSE events were appended without id/sequence dedupe, allowing duplicate THINKING content in the live panel. Implemented localized dedupe/replacement on event ingress in extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx and added targeted App tests covering identical replay and same-sequence fuller snapshot behavior. Verified with extension typecheck and targeted Vitest tests for the new scenarios.

args.content: Establish baseline for the Google plugin AI web assistant duplicate reasoning remediation. Strategy: stable normalized event semantics and single-display reasoning UX. Business: users must see each reasoning emission once in the active session and history. Application: python adapter normalization, shared extension event contract, sidepanel reasoning projection, live run state handling, and conversation rendering. Technology: Python adapter SSE ingestion, browser EventSource streaming, Chrome sidepanel runtime, and automated pytest/vitest validation.

Describe the element as a data object: passive data suitable for automated processing by application behavior. In this architecture, Core Domain Data captures the domain and state information created, read, and maintained by the core application system.

Describe the relationship as a realization: the source concept implements, fulfills, or makes the target concept concrete. In this architecture, Core Product Capability makes Product Delivery Goal concrete by providing the ability needed to achieve that strategic outcome.

args.content: Full-model baseline for duplicate THINKING text remediation: move root-cause control to the normalized event contract and reasoning projection boundary. Extend existing brownfield modules rather than creating new software units. Python adapter normalization must emit stable semantic metadata for reasoning/text emissions; extension shared protocol/api must validate that contract; reasoningTimeline.ts becomes the single read-model/projection authority that merges reasoning by semantic identity and separates assistant body text from Thinking process items; App.tsx remains limited to transport replay dedupe and lifecycle state; reasoningTimelineView.tsx is reduced to pure rendering with only light display sanitization. Fast-track commit 91d5b9324b106214e25e79e7f8bc728f74478871 is retained as a completed transport-level fix but is insufficient for the semantic duplicate root cause.

Fast-track commit 91d5b9324b106214e25e79e7f8bc728f74478871 is retained as a completed transport-level fix but is insufficient for the semantic duplicate root cause.

args.content: Brownfield fit decision: extend existing modules python_adapter/app/opencode_adapter.py, python_adapter/app/models.py, extension/src/shared/protocol.ts, extension/src/shared/api.ts, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts, extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx, and their tests. Do not create a new standalone reasoning service or duplicate event store because the repository already has clear ownership seams for normalization, contract validation, projection, live state, and rendering.

args.content: Architectural decision: normalized event contract is the primary fix locus. Transport replay dedupe in App.tsx remains necessary but cannot resolve semantic duplicates where one reasoning emission is normalized into multiple thinking events. Projection logic in reasoningTimeline.ts must consume stable semantic metadata and become the single authority for merging reasoning snapshots and deltas.

args.content: Architectural decision: reasoningTimelineView.tsx must stop owning semantic dedupe. Any existing near-duplicate trimming in the render layer should be minimized to display sanitization only, so that live and history views rely on the same projection semantics and defects remain visible at the correct architectural layer.

tasks.title: Implement normalized event contract metadata for reasoning and assistant text emissions
tasks.summary: Extend python_adapter/app/models.py and python_adapter/app/opencode_adapter.py so normalized events carry stable semantic metadata (such as projection channel, emission kind, and message/part identity) that distinguishes reasoning process events from assistant body text and allows same-semantic reasoning emissions to be merged downstream without weak text heuristics.

tasks.title: Adopt the extended normalized event contract in extension shared protocol and SSE schema validation
tasks.summary: Update extension/src/shared/protocol.ts and extension/src/shared/api.ts to model and validate the new normalized event metadata, preserving compatibility for null/optional fields while ensuring the sidepanel receives stable semantics from the adapter.

tasks.title: Refactor reasoningTimeline projection to merge Thinking by semantic identity instead of view-layer text dedupe
tasks.summary: Refactor extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts so buildReasoningTimelineItems, assistant response aggregation, and chat stream mapping consume semantic metadata, merge reasoning delta/snapshot events into a single Thinking projection, and keep assistant body text separate from process items with text similarity used only as a compatibility fallback.

tasks.title: Constrain App live run state handling to transport replay dedupe and lifecycle updates
tasks.summary: Keep extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx focused on current-run event ingress, event.id/(runId, sequence) replay dedupe, and lifecycle synchronization while removing any pressure to perform semantic reasoning dedupe in the live state layer. Treat fast-track commit 91d5b9324b106214e25e79e7f8bc728f74478871 as retained but insufficient prior work.

tasks.title: Reduce renderer duplicate-handling logic so Thinking rendering depends on projected read-model semantics
tasks.summary: Update extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx to consume already-projected Thinking items, keeping only light display sanitization and removing semantic duplicate resolution from the render layer so live and history views share the same projection behavior.

tasks.title: Add regression tests for normalized contract, projection merge, renderer scope, and current-session duplicate prevention
tasks.summary: Expand python_adapter/tests/test_opencode_adapter.py, extension/src/shared/api.test.ts, extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.test.ts, and extension/src/sidepanel/App.test.tsx to cover same-semantic reasoning emitted as delta plus snapshot, assistant text stream separation, view-model-only Thinking dedupe, renderer no-longer-owning semantic dedupe, and live current-session regressions.

args.content: Audit passed for commit 525290be0b9f29b365352c7f01e037c82d922ae5. Implementation aligns with approved duplicate-thinking remediation intent: normalized event contract carries semantic reasoning/assistant_text metadata in python_adapter/app/models.py and python_adapter/app/opencode_adapter.py; extension shared protocol/api validate and consume the contract in extension/src/shared/protocol.ts and extension/src/shared/api.ts; reasoningTimeline.ts is the single projection/read-model authority for semantic merge, assistant/result separation, and process-item dedupe; App.tsx is constrained to replay dedupe, lifecycle state, and final result persistence; reasoningTimelineView.tsx is reduced to display-only sanitization without semantic cross-item dedupe. Explicit ArchitectureID evidence exists for ELM-APP-008C, ELM-APP-EXT-SHARED-API-CONTRACT, ELM-APP-EXT-RUN-CONVERSATION-MAPPER, and ELM-APP-EXT-CONVERSATION-RENDERER, with repository-level evidence for ELM-APP-EXT-RUN-ORCHESTRATION. Regression tests cover semantic contract adoption, projection merge behavior, renderer scope, and current-session replay handling.

args.title: 扩展 Sidepanel 对齐 OpenCode Web 风格与关键体验的前端重构需求
args.content:
# Formal Requirement Draft

## Goal
将浏览器扩展 sidepanel 前端正式升级为“面向 AI coding / AI web assistant 场景的工作台”，在视觉风格、信息架构、关键交互能力上尽量贴近 OpenCode Web 的产品气质与使用方式，但保持现有 React 19 + Vite + TypeScript + CSS 技术栈和浏览器扩展上下文能力。

## Scope
### Product Objective
- 将当前偏 VS Code/Copilot 的深色会话面板，升级为更具产品品牌感、现代感、结构化表达的 AI assistant 工作台。
- 让用户更容易理解“当前页面上下文 → 规则命中/采集 → 对话执行 → 推理过程 → 最终结果”的完整链路。
- 将现有复杂功能重新组织为更清晰的一层主工作区 + 辅助控制台/面板的体验，而非简单堆叠。
- 在不牺牲扩展特有能力的前提下，对齐 OpenCode Web 的核心产品叙事：agent-like、plan/build-like、streaming、structured output。

### Target User Experience
- 用户打开 sidepanel 后，应第一时间感知这是一个“AI 工作台”而非普通设置页。
- 用户应能在一个主视图中连续完成：查看当前状态、输入任务、观察流式进展、补充问题、查看结果。
- 用户应能低成本访问扩展特有能力：当前页面上下文、域名授权状态、字段采集结果、规则编辑、历史会话。
- 用户应感知到系统存在“工作模式/阶段”概念，如对话、分析、计划、执行、结果，而不是只有原始事件流。
- 输出结果应更结构化、更文档化，适合阅读、追溯和继续迭代。

### Core Function Layers
1. Shell and Information Architecture
- 重构 sidepanel 主布局，形成“主对话工作区 + 辅助控制台/抽屉/悬浮面板”的清晰层次。
- 主工作区承载核心对话、流式输出、当前运行状态、关键模式标签。
- 辅助区域承载历史会话、页面上下文、规则配置、运行元信息。

2. Conversation and Execution Experience
- 保留并优化现有 prompt 输入、发送、补充回答、重试、续聊、新会话能力。
- 对齐 OpenCode Web 风格的流式输出体验，提升过程感、阶段感、结果感。
- 将现有 reasoning timeline 从“技术事件呈现”提升为“用户可理解的执行过程呈现”。

3. Mode and Status Expression
- 前端需显式表达工作模式/阶段，如 Agent、Plan、Build、Ask、Result；允许基于现有状态映射，而非要求后端新增同名协议。
- 模式表达可通过顶部状态区、阶段标签、时间线节点、分段消息等形式体现。

4. Structured Output Presentation
- 最终回答区支持更清晰的层级化展示，如摘要、步骤、结果、错误、补充问题、引用上下文。
- 对采集结果、权限状态、规则命中、运行标识等信息进行结构化展示，而非分散文本堆叠。

5. Brownfield Feature Retention
- 必须保留页面规则配置能力。
- 必须保留页面上下文/字段采集/权限申请能力。
- 必须保留会话历史、当前会话切换、历史详情查看能力。
- 必须保留追问问答与等待补充信息状态。
- 必须保留运行状态、错误状态、重试能力。

6. Visual Design System
- 建立一套新的深色视觉语言、组件层级和设计 token，替代当前单纯 Copilot/VS Code 风格映射。
- 支持品牌化标题区、状态标签、卡片层次、柔和高亮、精致边框/阴影/背景层。

7. Accessibility and Usability
- 保证 sidepanel 狭窄宽度下的可用性。
- 保证键盘操作、滚动、焦点状态、文本可读性和长内容浏览体验。

## User Stories / Usage Scenarios
- 作为扩展用户，我希望打开 sidepanel 就能理解当前 assistant 能做什么、现在处于什么阶段。
- 作为扩展用户，我希望输入一个任务后能看到像 OpenCode Web 一样更有过程感的执行流，而不是零散状态。
- 作为扩展用户，我希望在等待补充信息时清楚知道系统卡在哪里，并直接补充答案继续执行。
- 作为扩展用户，我希望查看当前页面上下文、授权状态和规则命中情况，以确认 assistant 的输入依据。
- 作为扩展用户，我希望能方便切换历史会话与当前会话，并理解哪些内容可继续、哪些只是回看。
- 作为规则维护者，我希望在不离开主工作台的情况下管理规则与字段采集逻辑。
- 作为产品使用者，我希望最终结果更像结构化工作输出，而不是纯聊天文本。

## Acceptance Criteria
- 编排后的 sidepanel 在首屏即可明确展示：产品身份、当前状态、主任务输入区、当前会话主视图。
- 用户可在一个主工作流中完成：输入任务、观察流式过程、响应追问、查看结果。
- 界面中必须存在清晰的模式/阶段表达，且能映射到现有执行状态，不得只有原始技术字段裸露。
- 历史会话、当前会话、历史只读查看三者可被用户明确区分。
- 页面上下文面板中至少可见：当前页面标识、授权状态、规则命中状态、采集结果摘要、异常提示。
- 规则配置能力在新界面中仍可完整执行：新增规则、删除规则、编辑规则、字段配置、启停、保存。
- 当系统等待补充信息时，界面明确显示等待原因与可提交入口，且用户完成输入后可继续原流程。
- 当系统流式输出时，用户可持续感知任务进展；当完成或失败时，界面有清晰终态。
- 结果区支持结构化阅读，长文本在 sidepanel 中仍可滚动和浏览，不出现核心信息不可达。
- 新视觉风格应显著弱化当前 VS Code/Copilot 既视感，形成更统一的 AI assistant 工作台风格。
- 保留现有 brownfield 能力且无功能性倒退：页面规则、页面上下文、域名授权、历史记录、推理时间线、重试、续聊。
- 方案不得以技术栈迁移为前提条件。

## Constraints
- 不迁移现有前端技术栈至 Astro/Solid。
- 不要求重写扩展后台、消息协议或服务端，只允许为前端呈现所需做最小接口补充。
- 不移除现有可工作的 brownfield 能力。
- 必须适配浏览器扩展 sidepanel 的尺寸与运行限制。
- 视觉改造应基于现有 App.tsx 与 styles.css 所在模块演进，不要求重建整个仓库结构。
- 应优先通过组件拆分、样式系统化、信息架构重组实现，不以一次性大爆炸替换为唯一方案。

## Open Questions / Assumptions
- “按 OpenCode Web 的风格和功能实现”解释为对齐产品气质、信息架构和关键交互，不包含官网营销页内容复刻。
- “功能对齐”解释为优先对齐工作台式 AI assistant 体验，而非完整复制 OpenCode 全平台能力。
- 当前后端能力以现有 run/status/events/question/history/context/rules 协议为主，前端应尽量复用。
- provider-agnostic、tool-enabled 等叙事可在 UI 文案和结构中体现，但不作为首期必须具备的真实后端能力。

name.value: 扩展 Sidepanel 对齐 OpenCode Web 风格与关键体验的前端重构需求

documentation.value:
# Formal Requirement Draft

## Goal
将浏览器扩展 sidepanel 前端正式升级为“面向 AI coding / AI web assistant 场景的工作台”，在视觉风格、信息架构、关键交互能力上尽量贴近 OpenCode Web 的产品气质与使用方式，但保持现有 React 19 + Vite + TypeScript + CSS 技术栈和浏览器扩展上下文能力。

## Scope
### Product Objective
- 将当前偏 VS Code/Copilot 的深色会话面板，升级为更具产品品牌感、现代感、结构化表达的 AI assistant 工作台。
- 让用户更容易理解“当前页面上下文 → 规则命中/采集 → 对话执行 → 推理过程 → 最终结果”的完整链路。
- 将现有复杂功能重新组织为更清晰的一层主工作区 + 辅助控制台/面板的体验，而非简单堆叠。
- 在不牺牲扩展特有能力的前提下，对齐 OpenCode Web 的核心产品叙事：agent-like、plan/build-like、streaming、structured output。

### Target User Experience
- 用户打开 sidepanel 后，应第一时间感知这是一个“AI 工作台”而非普通设置页。
- 用户应能在一个主视图中连续完成：查看当前状态、输入任务、观察流式进展、补充问题、查看结果。
- 用户应能低成本访问扩展特有能力：当前页面上下文、域名授权状态、字段采集结果、规则编辑、历史会话。
- 用户应感知到系统存在“工作模式/阶段”概念，如对话、分析、计划、执行、结果，而不是只有原始事件流。
- 输出结果应更结构化、更文档化，适合阅读、追溯和继续迭代。

### Core Function Layers
1. Shell and Information Architecture
- 重构 sidepanel 主布局，形成“主对话工作区 + 辅助控制台/抽屉/悬浮面板”的清晰层次。
- 主工作区承载核心对话、流式输出、当前运行状态、关键模式标签。
- 辅助区域承载历史会话、页面上下文、规则配置、运行元信息。

2. Conversation and Execution Experience
- 保留并优化现有 prompt 输入、发送、补充回答、重试、续聊、新会话能力。
- 对齐 OpenCode Web 风格的流式输出体验，提升过程感、阶段感、结果感。
- 将现有 reasoning timeline 从“技术事件呈现”提升为“用户可理解的执行过程呈现”。

3. Mode and Status Expression
- 前端需显式表达工作模式/阶段，如 Agent、Plan、Build、Ask、Result；允许基于现有状态映射，而非要求后端新增同名协议。
- 模式表达可通过顶部状态区、阶段标签、时间线节点、分段消息等形式体现。

4. Structured Output Presentation
- 最终回答区支持更清晰的层级化展示，如摘要、步骤、结果、错误、补充问题、引用上下文。
- 对采集结果、权限状态、规则命中、运行标识等信息进行结构化展示，而非分散文本堆叠。

5. Brownfield Feature Retention
- 必须保留页面规则配置能力。
- 必须保留页面上下文/字段采集/权限申请能力。
- 必须保留会话历史、当前会话切换、历史详情查看能力。
- 必须保留追问问答与等待补充信息状态。
- 必须保留运行状态、错误状态、重试能力。

6. Visual Design System
- 建立一套新的深色视觉语言、组件层级和设计 token，替代当前单纯 Copilot/VS Code 风格映射。
- 支持品牌化标题区、状态标签、卡片层次、柔和高亮、精致边框/阴影/背景层。

7. Accessibility and Usability
- 保证 sidepanel 狭窄宽度下的可用性。
- 保证键盘操作、滚动、焦点状态、文本可读性和长内容浏览体验。

## User Stories / Usage Scenarios
- 作为扩展用户，我希望打开 sidepanel 就能理解当前 assistant 能做什么、现在处于什么阶段。
- 作为扩展用户，我希望输入一个任务后能看到像 OpenCode Web 一样更有过程感的执行流，而不是零散状态。
- 作为扩展用户，我希望在等待补充信息时清楚知道系统卡在哪里，并直接补充答案继续执行。
- 作为扩展用户，我希望查看当前页面上下文、授权状态和规则命中情况，以确认 assistant 的输入依据。
- 作为扩展用户，我希望能方便切换历史会话与当前会话，并理解哪些内容可继续、哪些只是回看。
- 作为规则维护者，我希望在不离开主工作台的情况下管理规则与字段采集逻辑。
- 作为产品使用者，我希望最终结果更像结构化工作输出，而不是纯聊天文本。

## Acceptance Criteria
- 编排后的 sidepanel 在首屏即可明确展示：产品身份、当前状态、主任务输入区、当前会话主视图。
- 用户可在一个主工作流中完成：输入任务、观察流式过程、响应追问、查看结果。
- 界面中必须存在清晰的模式/阶段表达，且能映射到现有执行状态，不得只有原始技术字段裸露。
- 历史会话、当前会话、历史只读查看三者可被用户明确区分。
- 页面上下文面板中至少可见：当前页面标识、授权状态、规则命中状态、采集结果摘要、异常提示。
- 规则配置能力在新界面中仍可完整执行：新增规则、删除规则、编辑规则、字段配置、启停、保存。
- 当系统等待补充信息时，界面明确显示等待原因与可提交入口，且用户完成输入后可继续原流程。
- 当系统流式输出时，用户可持续感知任务进展；当完成或失败时，界面有清晰终态。
- 结果区支持结构化阅读，长文本在 sidepanel 中仍可滚动和浏览，不出现核心信息不可达。
- 新视觉风格应显著弱化当前 VS Code/Copilot 既视感，形成更统一的 AI assistant 工作台风格。
- 保留现有 brownfield 能力且无功能性倒退：页面规则、页面上下文、域名授权、历史记录、推理时间线、重试、续聊。
- 方案不得以技术栈迁移为前提条件。

## Constraints
- 不迁移现有前端技术栈至 Astro/Solid。
- 不要求重写扩展后台、消息协议或服务端，只允许为前端呈现所需做最小接口补充。
- 不移除现有可工作的 brownfield 能力。
- 必须适配浏览器扩展 sidepanel 的尺寸与运行限制。
- 视觉改造应基于现有 App.tsx 与 styles.css 所在模块演进，不要求重建整个仓库结构。
- 应优先通过组件拆分、样式系统化、信息架构重组实现，不以一次性大爆炸替换为唯一方案。

## Open Questions / Assumptions
- “按 OpenCode Web 的风格和功能实现”解释为对齐产品气质、信息架构和关键交互，不包含官网营销页内容复刻。
- “功能对齐”解释为优先对齐工作台式 AI assistant 体验，而非完整复制 OpenCode 全平台能力。
- 当前后端能力以现有 run/status/events/question/history/context/rules 协议为主，前端应尽量复用。
- provider-agnostic、tool-enabled 等叙事可在 UI 文案和结构中体现，但不作为首期必须具备的真实后端能力。

args.title: Sidepanel Conversation Shell
args.content: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Sidepanel Conversation Shell coordinates sidepanel state, layout zones, active session routing, permission prompts, and auxiliary console visibility while delegating conversation projection and rendering to specialized modules.

documentation.value: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Sidepanel Conversation Shell coordinates sidepanel state, layout zones, active session routing, permission prompts, and auxiliary console visibility while delegating conversation projection and rendering to specialized modules.

args.title: Live History Workspace
args.content: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Live History Workspace manages current-session history retrieval, read-only historical run detail loading, and the user experience boundaries between active conversation, historical session navigation, and archived detail viewing inside the sidepanel.

documentation.value: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Live History Workspace manages current-session history retrieval, read-only historical run detail loading, and the user experience boundaries between active conversation, historical session navigation, and archived detail viewing inside the sidepanel.

args.title: Sidepanel Design System Layer
args.content: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Sidepanel Design System Layer owns reusable visual tokens, surfaces, typography, spacing, status colors, and readability rules for the extension sidepanel without introducing a new frontend framework.

documentation.value: Describe the element as an application component: a modular application building block that encapsulates automated behavior and data. In this architecture, Sidepanel Design System Layer owns reusable visual tokens, surfaces, typography, spacing, status colors, and readability rules for the extension sidepanel without introducing a new frontend framework.

args.content: Phase 1 MVP will refactor extension/src/sidepanel as a brownfield OpenCode-style working cockpit by extending App.tsx, reasoningTimeline.ts(x), useRunHistory.ts, and shared protocol/types. The design preserves runtime wiring and extension-only capabilities while reorganizing the shell, stage, auxiliary panels, design tokens, and conservative stage/mode mapping for narrow sidepanel constraints.

result.designSummary: Phase 1 MVP will refactor extension/src/sidepanel as a brownfield OpenCode-style working cockpit by extending App.tsx, reasoningTimeline.ts(x), useRunHistory.ts, and shared protocol/types. The design preserves runtime wiring and extension-only capabilities while reorganizing the shell, stage, auxiliary panels, design tokens, and conservative stage/mode mapping for narrow sidepanel constraints.

args.content: Decision: Use extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx as the primary brownfield ownership boundary for the sidepanel refactor. Rationale: it already coordinates runtime state hydration, permission prompts, rules CRUD, session selection, history loading, stream lifecycle, and composer actions, so replacing it with a parallel entry would create higher regression risk than controlled seam extraction.

decisions: Decision: Use extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx as the primary brownfield ownership boundary for the sidepanel refactor. Rationale: it already coordinates runtime state hydration, permission prompts, rules CRUD, session selection, history loading, stream lifecycle, and composer actions, so replacing it with a parallel entry would create higher regression risk than controlled seam extraction.

args.content: Decision: Reuse extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts as the single semantic mapping authority for mode/stage/status presentation. Rationale: it already aggregates normalized run events, filters orchestration noise, merges assistant result text, and exposes presentation helpers; therefore Phase 1 should add conservative view-model mapping there instead of changing backend protocol or duplicating semantics in the renderer.

decisions: Decision: Use extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx as the primary brownfield ownership boundary for the sidepanel refactor. Rationale: it already coordinates runtime state hydration, permission prompts, rules CRUD, session selection, history loading, stream lifecycle, and composer actions, so replacing it with a parallel entry would create higher regression risk than controlled seam extraction.

Decision: Reuse extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts as the single semantic mapping authority for mode/stage/status presentation. Rationale: it already aggregates normalized run events, filters orchestration noise, merges assistant result text, and exposes presentation helpers; therefore Phase 1 should add conservative view-model mapping there instead of changing backend protocol or duplicating semantics in the renderer.

args.content: Decision: Reuse extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx as the conversation stage renderer and extend it toward a main-stage experience with structured results. Rationale: it already supports streaming turns, markdown output, inline question answering, retry, copy, and feedback, making it the least risky place to evolve the main conversation workspace.

Rationale: it already coordinates runtime state hydration, permission prompts, rules CRUD, session selection, history loading, stream lifecycle, and composer actions, so replacing it with a parallel entry would create higher regression risk than controlled seam extraction.

Rationale: it already aggregates normalized run events, filters orchestration noise, merges assistant result text, and exposes presentation helpers; therefore Phase 1 should add conservative view-model mapping there instead of changing backend protocol or duplicating semantics in the renderer.

Decision: Reuse extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx as the conversation stage renderer and extend it toward a main-stage experience with structured results. Rationale: it already supports streaming turns, markdown output, inline question answering, retry, copy, and feedback, making it the least risky place to evolve the main conversation workspace.

args.content: Decision: Introduce one lightweight new software unit, Sidepanel Design System Layer, anchored in extension/src/sidepanel/styles.css and optional adjacent CSS seams. Rationale: the current stylesheet already centralizes most visual behavior, so visual modernization can be achieved without adopting a UI framework or large component library.

tasks.title: 重构 sidepanel 主壳层与信息架构
tasks.summary: Extend extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx as the brownfield shell coordinator. Reorganize the sidepanel into product identity/status header, working stage container, docked composer, and auxiliary panel routing while preserving existing runtime state hydration, permission prompts, session continuity, and current run wiring. External OpenCode Web references may be used only as bounded visual/information-architecture inspiration and must not trigger new protocol, stack, or parallel entrypoint creation.

tasks.title: 建立 sidepanel 深色视觉 token 与设计系统层
tasks.summary: Create a lightweight design-system layer anchored in extension/src/sidepanel/styles.css. Normalize tokens for color, surface, border, radius, spacing, typography, status, chips, and markdown readability; restyle existing UI toward OpenCode-like product tone while explicitly avoiding pixel-copying, UI framework adoption, or breaking current CSS-driven component contracts.

tasks.title: 重构会话主舞台与结构化结果呈现
tasks.summary: Extend extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx and adjacent App stage usage into a main conversation stage that clearly separates live progress, assistant questions, final answer, and structured reading regions. Preserve retry, copy, feedback, markdown, and inline question answering, but improve result scanning and sidepanel readability for narrow widths.

tasks.title: 增强运行状态到阶段/模式表达的保守映射
tasks.summary: Extend extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts and questionState.ts to produce conservative UI-facing stage/mode/status mapping from existing run status, stream status, pending questions, and normalized events. Do not modify backend/shared protocol semantics; instead expose a stable view-model for collecting, streaming, waiting_for_answer, done, and error states plus result-oriented copy.
tasks.softwareUnitTitle: Run Status and Stage Mapping Adapter

tasks.title: 重组历史、上下文与规则辅助面板
tasks.summary: Extend App.tsx and useRunHistory.ts around the existing history workspace to clarify current session vs historical sessions vs read-only archived detail, and to reorganize page context, domain authorization, and rules access as bounded auxiliary panels. Preserve all existing rule management and context/permission capabilities; prefer selective extraction over broad directory proliferation.
tasks.softwareUnitTitle: History Context and Rules Auxiliary Panels

tasks.title: 补强 sidepanel brownfield 回归测试
tasks.summary: Extend App.test.tsx and reasoningTimeline.test.ts with regression coverage for the new shell hierarchy, permission callout placement, session selection boundaries, question-answer continuation, structured result rendering, and conservative stage mapping. Keep tests anchored to current runtime/message contracts so refactor risk is contained without rewriting the test strategy.

args.content: Audit follow-up decision for commit 567d4733bbc14b1860e6e482e886cb7301e1e403: ReworkRequired without model change. The approved architecture and task decomposition remain valid; the gap is limited to missing explicit traceability evidence for TASK-010 and TASK-014. Implementation should reuse TASK-010 and TASK-014, add explicit ArchitectureID evidence for ELM-APP-EXT-SIDEPANEL-DESIGN-SYSTEM in the sidepanel design-system boundary (e.g. styles.css marker or architecture-mapping file), and add explicit ArchitectureID evidence for ELM-001 in the regression test boundary so Audit can trace requirement coverage directly. No architecture expansion or new software units are required; preserve retry history on the existing tasks.

decisions: Decision: Use extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx as the primary brownfield ownership boundary for the sidepanel refactor. Rationale: it already coordinates runtime state hydration, permission prompts, rules CRUD, session selection, history loading, stream lifecycle, and composer actions, so replacing it with a parallel entry would create higher regression risk than controlled seam extraction.

Decision: Reuse extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts as the single semantic mapping authority for mode/stage/status presentation. Rationale: it already aggregates normalized run events, filters orchestration noise, merges assistant result text, and exposes presentation helpers; therefore Phase 1 should add conservative view-model mapping there instead of changing backend protocol or duplicating semantics in the renderer.

Decision: Reuse extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx as the conversation stage renderer and extend it toward a main-stage experience with structured results. Rationale: it already supports streaming turns, markdown output, inline question answering, retry, copy, and feedback, making it the least risky place to evolve the main conversation workspace.

Decision: Introduce one lightweight new software unit, Sidepanel Design System Layer, anchored in extension/src/sidepanel/styles.css and optional adjacent CSS seams. Rationale: the current stylesheet already centralizes most visual behavior, so visual modernization can be achieved without adopting a UI framework or large component library.

Audit follow-up decision for commit 567d4733bbc14b1860e6e482e886cb7301e1e403: ReworkRequired without model change. The approved architecture and task decomposition remain valid; the gap is limited to missing explicit traceability evidence for TASK-010 and TASK-014. Implementation should reuse TASK-010 and TASK-014, add explicit ArchitectureID evidence for ELM-APP-EXT-SIDEPANEL-DESIGN-SYSTEM in the sidepanel design-system boundary (e.g. styles.css marker or architecture-mapping file), and add explicit ArchitectureID evidence for ELM-001 in the regression test boundary so Audit can trace requirement coverage directly. No architecture expansion or new software units are required; preserve retry history on the existing tasks.

args.title: Formal Requirement
args.content:
# Formal Requirement Draft

## Goal
对 `extension/src/sidepanel` 进行**重做**，并将“参考 OpenCode Web/Console 开源代码”从弱约束提升为**强制性设计与实现约束**。  
本次目标不是更换技术栈，而是让最终 sidepanel 在**界面风格、布局结构、组件层级、信息组织、交互方式**上，明显对齐 **OpenCode Web / Console 开源实现**，同时完整保留浏览器扩展 brownfield 能力。

## Scope
### In Scope
- 改造对象限定为：`/mnt/d/projects/googlepluginForAiwebassistant/extension/src/sidepanel`
- 后续架构设计与开发实现必须明确参考以下 OpenCode 开源代码区域：
  - `https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode`
  - `packages/console/app/src`
  - `packages/web/src`
- 参考资产至少覆盖以下类别：
  - `app.tsx`
  - `app.css`
  - `style`
  - `component`
  - `routes`
  - `assets`
  - `pages`
  - `components`
  - `styles`
- 输出给开发的内容必须包含“**可执行参考清单**”，而不是只写“参考 OpenCode 风格”
- 在对齐 OpenCode 风格/功能的前提下，必须保留扩展既有能力：
  - 页面规则
  - 页面上下文
  - 权限
  - 历史会话
  - 追问问答
  - 推理时间线
  - 重试机制

### Out of Scope
- 不允许只参考 README、官网描述、截图、文字介绍来代替开源代码参考
- 不以“技术栈相似”作为完成标准
- 不要求 1:1 完整复制 OpenCode 全站全部业务能力
- 不包含本次直接编码、文件修改、实现提交

## User Stories / Usage Scenarios
1. 作为需求提出方，我希望架构师把 **OpenCode Web/Console 的实际开源代码入口与文件级参考点**整理给开发，确保实现不是凭印象模仿。
2. 作为开发者，我需要拿到一个**可执行参考清单**，明确哪些页面、组件、样式、布局、信息架构、交互流应优先对齐，避免再次出现“风格和功能完全不像 OpenCode Web”的偏差。
3. 作为产品/验收方，我希望最终 sidepanel 虽然是浏览器扩展 brownfield 场景，但用户使用时能感知到它与 OpenCode Web/Console 在视觉语言和交互组织上的明显一致性。
4. 作为扩展产品维护者，我要求在界面重做后，原有扩展能力不能被牺牲，而是要以更接近 OpenCode 的方式被重新组织和呈现。

## Acceptance Criteria
1. **强制参考源**
   - 架构与实现文档中必须把 OpenCode 开源仓库及指定代码区域列为主要参考源，而非补充材料。
   - 必须明确声明：参考依据是**开源代码本身**，不是 README/官网描述。

2. **可执行参考清单**
   - 后续交给开发的设计/架构输入中，必须包含一份“可执行参考清单”，至少包含：
     - 参考仓库与路径
     - 目标文件/目录类别
     - 每一项参考意图（布局、视觉、组件、路由、信息架构、交互、资源样式）
     - 与 sidepanel 目标模块的映射关系
     - 应保留的扩展能力映射
   - 清单应达到开发可据此逐项落地的粒度，而不是“整体参考某站风格”的泛化描述。

3. **纠正上一轮不足**
   - 必须明确记录并纠正上一轮失败原因：
     - 参考强度不够
     - 对 OpenCode 风格对齐不严格
     - 对 OpenCode 功能组织方式对齐不严格
     - 仅有抽象借鉴，缺少基于开源代码的结构化映射
   - 后续方案必须把“风格对齐”和“功能组织对齐”列为核心验收项，而非软性建议。

4. **界面与交互对齐要求**
   - sidepanel 的整体视觉风格、页面布局、主次层级、组件组织、信息区块划分、交互路径，应明显更接近 OpenCode Web/Console 开源实现。
   - 至少应在以下维度体现对齐：
     - 页面框架结构
     - 聊天/会话区域组织
     - 工具栏或操作区层级
     - 信息面板与状态展示方式
     - 视觉资源与样式语言
     - 交互节奏与反馈方式

5. **Brownfield 能力保留**
   - 以下能力必须保留，且不得因重做而缺失：
     - 页面规则
     - 页面上下文
     - 权限
     - 历史会话
     - 追问问答
     - 推理时间线
     - 重试
   - 这些能力应被重新编排进更接近 OpenCode 的 UI 结构中，而不是被删除、弱化或藏匿到不可用状态。

6. **交付给 SystemArchitect 的要求**
   - 本需求可直接作为架构输入，要求架构师后续输出中必须包含：
     - OpenCode 参考代码清单
     - sidepanel 目标模块映射
     - 保留能力映射
     - 差异说明（哪些可直接借鉴，哪些需因扩展场景做适配）

## Constraints
- 项目类型是 brownfield 浏览器扩展前端，不是从零构建的普通 Web 页面
- 改造范围限定在 `extension/src/sidepanel`
- 必须兼容扩展场景下的页面规则、上下文、权限与会话机制
- 本次重做重点是“参考开源代码的严格程度”和“风格/功能组织对齐程度”，不是单纯技术实现可行性
- 后续架构师和开发不得将“参考 OpenCode”降级为口头描述或二手总结

## Open Questions / Assumptions
### Assumptions
- 用户已明确同意将 OpenCode 开源代码作为后续架构与实现的强制参考源
- 当前无需新增产品能力，核心是按更严格参考标准重做 sidepanel
- 架构阶段应补充形成文件级/模块级参考映射清单

### Final Structured Result Preview
- `status`: approved 后输出
- `title`: 基于 OpenCode 开源代码强参考的 Sidepanel 重做需求
- `summary`: 以 OpenCode Web/Console 开源代码为强制参考源，重做 `extension/src/sidepanel`，纠正上一轮参考不足导致的风格与功能不对齐问题，同时保留扩展 brownfield 能力。

4. 作为扩展产品维护者，我要求在界面重做后，原有扩展能力不能被牺牲，而是要以更接近 OpenCode 的方式被重新组织和呈现。

## Acceptance Criteria
1. **强制参考源**
   - 架构与实现文档中必须把 OpenCode 开源仓库及指定代码区域列为主要参考源，而非补充材料。
   - 必须明确声明：参考依据是**开源代码本身**，不是 README/官网描述。

2. **可执行参考清单**
   - 后续交给开发的设计/架构输入中，必须包含一份“可执行参考清单”，至少包含：
     - 参考仓库与路径
     - 目标文件/目录类别
     - 每一项参考意图（布局、视觉、组件、路由、信息架构、交互、资源样式）
     - 与 sidepanel 目标模块的映射关系
     - 应保留的扩展能力映射
   - 清单应达到开发可据此逐项落地的粒度，而不是“整体参考某站风格”的泛化描述。

3. **纠正上一轮不足**
   - 必须明确记录并纠正上一轮失败原因：
     - 参考强度不够
     - 对 OpenCode 风格对齐不严格
     - 对 OpenCode 功能组织方式对齐不严格
     - 仅有抽象借鉴，缺少基于开源代码的结构化映射
   - 后续方案必须把“风格对齐”和“功能组织对齐”列为核心验收项，而非软性建议。

4. **界面与交互对齐要求**
   - sidepanel 的整体视觉风格、页面布局、主次层级、组件组织、信息区块划分、交互路径，应明显更接近 OpenCode Web/Console 开源实现。
   - 至少应在以下维度体现对齐：
     - 页面框架结构
     - 聊天/会话区域组织
     - 工具栏或操作区层级
     - 信息面板与状态展示方式
     - 视觉资源与样式语言
     - 交互节奏与反馈方式

5. **Brownfield 能力保留**
   - 以下能力必须保留，且不得因重做而缺失：
     - 页面规则
     - 页面上下文
     - 权限
     - 历史会话
     - 追问问答
     - 推理时间线
     - 重试
   - 这些能力应被重新编排进更接近 OpenCode 的 UI 结构中，而不是被删除、弱化或藏匿到不可用状态。

6. **交付给 SystemArchitect 的要求**
   - 本需求可直接作为架构输入，要求架构师后续输出中必须包含：
     - OpenCode 参考代码清单
     - sidepanel 目标模块映射
     - 保留能力映射
     - 差异说明（哪些可直接借鉴，哪些需因扩展场景做适配）

## Constraints
- 项目类型是 brownfield 浏览器扩展前端，不是从零构建的普通 Web 页面
- 改造范围限定在 `extension/src/sidepanel`
- 必须兼容扩展场景下的页面规则、上下文、权限与会话机制
- 本次重做重点是“参考开源代码的严格程度”和“风格/功能组织对齐程度”，不是单纯技术实现可行性
- 后续架构师和开发不得将“参考 OpenCode”降级为口头描述或二手总结

## Open Questions / Assumptions
### Assumptions
- 用户已明确同意将 OpenCode 开源代码作为后续架构与实现的强制参考源
- 当前无需新增产品能力，核心是按更严格参考标准重做 sidepanel
- 架构阶段应补充形成文件级/模块级参考映射清单

### Final Structured Result Preview
- `status`: approved 后输出
- `title`: 基于 OpenCode 开源代码强参考的 Sidepanel 重做需求
- `summary`: 以 OpenCode Web/Console 开源代码为强制参考源，重做 `extension/src/sidepanel`，纠正上一轮参考不足导致的风格与功能不对齐问题，同时保留扩展 brownfield 能力。

args.title: Formal Requirement
args.content:
# Formal Requirement Draft

## Goal
将 `extension/src/sidepanel` 当前已重构出的 sidepanel UI 进一步压缩为“主对话常驻、其余能力抽屉化”的信息架构：

- 仅保留主对话/结果舞台为主要常驻内容
- 将除主对话外的大多数信息展示、配置入口与辅助操作收纳到发送框下方的图标行
- 用户点击图标后，以“底部抽屉”形式在 composer 上方展开对应内容
- 在压缩常驻 UI 的同时，必须完整保留 brownfield 场景下已有关键能力与入口可达性

---

## Scope

### In Scope
目标范围限定在：`extension/src/sidepanel`

本轮需求覆盖以下内容：

1. **Sidepanel 常驻布局重定义**
   - 重新定义 header / main stage / auxiliary panels / composer / status rail 的常驻与非常驻关系
   - 建立“图标行 + 底部抽屉”的新交互模式

2. **辅助能力收纳策略**
   - 将非主对话类信息、配置、诊断、历史与上下文能力收纳进 composer 下方图标入口
   - 每个入口点击后在 composer 上方展开抽屉查看或编辑

3. **brownfield 能力保留**
   - 页面规则
   - 页面上下文
   - 权限
   - 历史会话
   - 追问问答
   - 推理时间线
   - 重试

4. **交互与状态规则**
   - 抽屉展开/收起逻辑
   - 图标激活态
   - 主对话连续性
   - 发送消息与抽屉的协同关系

### Out of Scope
本轮不包括：

- `extension/src/sidepanel` 之外的页面或扩展架构调整
- 新增 brownfield 能力种类
- 对底层推理、权限模型、历史存储机制、页面规则引擎的业务逻辑重写
- 超出“信息架构压缩 + 入口迁移 + 抽屉交互”范围的视觉大改版
- 服务端接口、协议或数据模型重构

---

## User Stories / Usage Scenarios

1. **作为用户**
   我希望 sidepanel 打开后优先看到主对话与结果舞台，而不是被大量辅助面板占据空间，以便专注完成当前任务。

2. **作为用户**
   我希望页面规则、页面上下文、权限、历史会话等能力仍然存在，但默认收起，仅在我需要时通过发送框下方图标快速打开。

3. **作为用户**
   我希望点击某个图标后，以底部抽屉方式在 composer 上方展开对应面板，这样不会打断主对话阅读，也不会跳转到其他区域。

4. **作为用户**
   我希望在使用追问问答、推理时间线、重试等调试/追踪能力时，仍然能与当前主对话保持上下文连续，不丢失当前输入与阅读位置。

5. **作为 brownfield 使用者**
   我希望压缩 UI 后不损失已有关键控制入口，否则会影响复杂页面分析、权限处理与历史回看效率。

---

## Constant vs Drawer Layout Definition

### 常驻区域（必须始终可见）
1. **主对话/结果舞台**
   - 作为 sidepanel 的核心主体内容常驻显示
   - 包含当前任务的对话流、回答结果、结果舞台展示
   - 是默认视觉焦点，不因辅助面板打开而被替换或隐藏

2. **Composer**
   - 输入框、发送行为及与当前会话直接相关的基本输入能力常驻显示

3. **Composer 下方图标行**
   - 作为所有辅助能力的统一入口常驻显示
   - 图标行位于发送框下方
   - 每个图标对应一个抽屉面板类别

### 进入图标抽屉的区域（默认收起，按需展开）
以下能力默认不得以独立常驻大面板形式占据主界面，应迁移到 composer 下方图标行触发的底部抽屉中：

1. **页面规则**
2. **页面上下文**
3. **权限**
4. **历史会话**
5. **追问问答**
6. **推理时间线**
7. **重试**
8. **其他当前属于 auxiliary panels / status rail 的非主对话信息与操作入口**
   - 前提：不影响主对话发送与结果阅读
   - 原则上全部归并为图标抽屉入口，而非继续常驻侧面或顶部区域

### Header 处理原则
- Header 不再承载大面积常驻辅助信息
- 若 header 存在品牌、标题或极简全局控制，可保留为轻量存在
- 但不得重新演化为辅助信息堆叠区，避免违背“除主对话外全收纳”的目标

---

## Interaction Principles

1. **主对话优先**
   - 用户进入 sidepanel 后，主对话/结果舞台始终是第一视觉层级
   - 打开辅助能力不得替代主对话主体地位

2. **默认收纳**
   - 除主对话/结果舞台与 composer 相关基础输入外，其余模块默认收起
   - 用户按需打开，而不是系统默认展开多个面板

3. **统一入口**
   - 所有辅助能力从 composer 下方图标行进入
   - 避免入口分散在 header、侧边栏、状态栏等多个位置

4. **底部抽屉展开**
   - 点击图标后，对应内容以“composer 上方的底部抽屉”展开
   - 抽屉是临时工作层，不是新的常驻主布局

5. **单任务聚焦**
   - 同一时刻应以一个激活抽屉为主，减少多面板并行造成的拥挤与认知负担

6. **上下文连续**
   - 打开/关闭抽屉不应清空当前输入、不应重置主对话滚动语义、不应破坏当前任务上下文

7. **能力不降级**
   - 抽屉化是入口与布局变化，不是功能删除或弱化
   - brownfield 核心能力必须完整可达、可查看、可编辑、可操作

---

## Functional Requirements

1. Sidepanel 必须重构为“主对话常驻 + composer 常驻 + 图标行常驻 + 辅助抽屉按需展开”的信息架构。

2. 系统必须仅将主对话/结果舞台作为主要内容常驻区域；其余辅助区域默认收起。

3. 系统必须在 composer 下方提供统一图标行，用于承载辅助能力入口。

4. 系统必须支持用户点击图标后，在 composer 上方打开底部抽屉。

5. 系统必须支持以下 brownfield 能力通过图标抽屉访问：
   - 页面规则
   - 页面上下文
   - 权限
   - 历史会话
   - 追问问答
   - 推理时间线
   - 重试

6. 系统必须将当前属于 `auxiliary panels` 与 `status rail` 的非主对话内容优先迁移到图标抽屉模式，除非其属于主对话发送所必需的最小常驻元素。

7. 系统不得要求用户离开当前主对话即可查看上述辅助能力。

8. 抽屉展开后，用户必须仍能感知当前主对话所在位置，且关闭抽屉后能无缝回到原任务流。

9. 若用户切换图标入口，系统应切换当前抽屉内容，而不是叠加多个长期占位面板。

10. 重试能力作为 brownfield 必保留能力，必须从图标抽屉中可触达，并与当前对话任务关联。

---

## Acceptance Criteria

1. **常驻内容约束**
   - 打开 sidepanel 后，主要常驻显示仅包括：
     - 主对话/结果舞台
     - composer
     - composer 下方图标行
   - 不再存在占据主体空间的常驻辅助面板群

2. **抽屉入口完整性**
   - 页面规则、页面上下文、权限、历史会话、追问问答、推理时间线、重试均可通过 composer 下方图标入口触达

3. **抽屉交互正确性**
   - 点击任一图标后，对应面板在 composer 上方以底部抽屉方式展开
   - 关闭抽屉后，界面恢复到主对话优先视图

4. **主对话不被替代**
   - 打开任意抽屉时，主对话/结果舞台仍为核心阅读区域，不被永久替换为辅助面板

5. **默认收起**
   - 初始状态下，非主对话辅助能力默认不展开

6. **单一激活体验**
   - 用户切换不同图标时，界面表现为切换当前抽屉内容，而不是同时展开多个辅助面板

7. **brownfield 能力保留**
   - 每个已列出的 brownfield 能力仍能完成其原有查看/编辑/触发目标，不因收纳而失效

8. **输入连续性**
   - 打开、切换、关闭抽屉不会清空 composer 当前输入内容

9. **范围约束**
   - 实现仅作用于 `extension/src/sidepanel`，不要求同步改动其他模块

---

## Constraints

1. **仓库范围约束**
   - 仅针对 `extension/src/sidepanel`

2. **产品方向约束**
   - 必须满足“除主对话外全收纳”的总体方向
   - 必须满足“只保留主对话/结果舞台常驻”的核心目标

3. **兼容性约束**
   - 当前刚完成接近 OpenCode 的拆分结构，新的需求应基于现有拆分后的模块边界继续收敛，而不是推翻整个 sidepanel 能力

4. **brownfield 约束**
   - 不能因 UI 压缩而移除页面规则、页面上下文、权限、历史会话、追问问答、推理时间线、重试

5. **交互形态约束**
   - 辅助内容必须通过“发送框下方图标 + composer 上方底部抽屉”这一统一模式进入

---

## Open Questions / Assumptions

### Assumptions
1. “主对话/结果舞台常驻”包含当前聊天消息流与结果展示主区域。
2. header 可保留极轻量壳层，但不应再承载辅助面板信息。
3. 图标数量与分组方式可在实现阶段细化，但不能改变“统一图标入口 + 底部抽屉”原则。
4. 本轮以信息架构和交互行为为主，不要求在需求层精确定义每个图标的视觉样式。

### No Blocking Open Questions
当前需求已足够正式化，可进入设计/架构拆解与实现评估阶段。

tasks.title: 收敛 sidepanel 顶层布局为单列主舞台 + 抽屉 + composer
tasks.summary: 移除顶层常驻 ShellHeader、左 sessions aside、右 status/aux aside；在主列内按 MainStage > Bottom Drawer Host > Composer 顺序重组布局，确保只有主舞台、composer、icon bar 常驻。

tasks.title: 将 activeConsole 升级为 activeDrawer 状态机并建立 icon bar 注册表
tasks.summary: 把 sessions/context/rules/null 扩展为 sessions/context/rules/run/null；统一实现 toggle/open/close/switch 单开策略、图标激活态、规则/会话操作后的自动抽屉切换，并把 composerRef 真正接到输入框以保证关闭抽屉、新会话、返回当前会话后的回焦与输入保持。

tasks.title: 把 Composer utility strip 收敛为常驻 icon bar
tasks.summary: 将现有 utility strip 明确拆成 drawer icons（sessions/context/rules/run）与即时动作（capture）；去掉无实际 brownfield 价值的占位入口噪声，保留激活、高亮、busy/pending 标识，并把 icon bar 视为 composer 子区域而非全局 header/rail。

tasks.title: 迁移历史会话能力到 sessions drawer
tasks.summary: 复用现有 SessionsPanel 作为抽屉内容，保持历史会话浏览、当前续聊目标切换、新会话、返回当前会话等行为；切换会话只影响主舞台内容，不清空 composer draft。

tasks.title: 迁移上下文/权限/规则/状态 rail 内容到 context 与 rules drawers
tasks.summary: 保留 ContextPanel 与 RulesPanel 主体，吸收 StatusRail 中的 live status、页面状态、reference digest、用户名等摘要；将权限申请、采集摘要、命中规则与参考映射统一放入 context/rules drawers，StatusRail 组件本体不再常驻。

tasks.title: 建立 run drawer，并确保主对话连续性不被抽屉打断
tasks.summary: 保持 ReasoningTimeline、追问问答、重试仍在 MainStage 内工作；同时新增 run drawer 作为统一入口，展示当前 run 阶段、待回答问题、推理摘要、最近可重试节点，满足图标入口可达但不把核心对话能力搬离主舞台。

tasks.title: 补齐抽屉层级样式与关键交互回归测试
tasks.summary: 定义 drawer 位于 composer 上方的布局层级、最大高度、滚动边界、sticky composer 和响应式行为，并补充 App.test.tsx 对默认收起、单开切换、prompt 不丢失、会话切换不中断、权限/规则/历史入口可达的回归覆盖。

args.content: Approved design persisted for python_adapter remote `/agent` capability discovery and canonical agent selection. The adapter must stop using local `.opencode/opencode.json` and `TARA_analyst.md` as the primary admission gate. Instead, before session create/reuse and `prompt_async`, it must query the remote opencode server `/agent`, resolve the canonical remote-supported analyst agent from the aliases `TARA_Analyst`, `TARA_analyst`, or `tara-analyst`, and use that resolved canonical agent for downstream session bootstrap. Runtime event and message processing remains the enforcement point for agent mismatch: if observed runtime agent evidence differs from the selected canonical remote agent, emit mismatch/error rather than relying on local repo configuration.

result.designSummary: Approved design persisted for python_adapter remote `/agent` capability discovery and canonical agent selection. The adapter must stop using local `.opencode/opencode.json` and `TARA_analyst.md` as the primary admission gate. Instead, before session create/reuse and `prompt_async`, it must query the remote opencode server `/agent`, resolve the canonical remote-supported analyst agent from the aliases `TARA_Analyst`, `TARA_analyst`, or `tara-analyst`, and use that resolved canonical agent for downstream session bootstrap. Runtime event and message processing remains the enforcement point for agent mismatch: if observed runtime agent evidence differs from the selected canonical remote agent, emit mismatch/error rather than relying on local repo configuration.

args.content: Legacy-fit decision: extend existing `python_adapter/app/opencode_adapter.py` within the `Opencode Event Normalizer` application component (`ELM-APP-008C`) instead of introducing a new module. Rationale: the adapter already owns session bootstrap, prompt dispatch, event normalization, and current primary-agent enforcement seams (`_ensure_tara_primary_agent`, `start_run`, runtime agent evidence checks), so remote `/agent` discovery and canonical selection belong in the same ownership boundary.

args.content: Admission decision: remote opencode `/agent` catalog is the source of truth for primary analyst availability. Local `.opencode/opencode.json` and `TARA_analyst.md` may remain as incidental local assets but must no longer block the main run-start flow.

args.content: Canonicalization decision: treat `TARA_Analyst`, `TARA_analyst`, and `tara-analyst` as equivalent analyst aliases during remote capability discovery, select the concrete remote-supported canonical agent name from the `/agent` response, and propagate that selected name into session create/reuse, `prompt_async`, and subsequent runtime mismatch validation.

args.content: Mismatch decision: runtime event/message agent evidence must be compared against the selected canonical remote agent, and only then produce mismatch errors. Absence of agent evidence is not itself a failure; contradictory evidence is.

Canonicalization decision: treat `TARA_Analyst`, `TARA_analyst`, and `tara-analyst` as equivalent analyst aliases during remote capability discovery, select the concrete remote-supported canonical agent name from the `/agent` response, and propagate that selected name into session create/reuse, `prompt_async`, and subsequent runtime mismatch validation.

Mismatch decision: runtime event/message agent evidence must be compared against the selected canonical remote agent, and only then produce mismatch errors. Absence of agent evidence is not itself a failure; contradictory evidence is.

args.title: Formal Requirement
args.content:
# Formal Requirement Draft

## Goal
让用户在 extension sidepanel 中显式看到并自行选择当前使用的“主 AGENT”，避免 adapter 虽已具备发现 TARA 的能力，但默认仍隐式连接到非用户期望的 primary agent。该能力需要覆盖 UI 展示、用户选择交互、adapter 请求/响应协议、默认值策略以及可选 agent 范围限制，并为后续架构分发提供可执行需求输入。

## Scope
### In Scope
1. **UI 展示**
   - 在 sidepanel 左下角现有底部 icon bar 区域新增“当前主 AGENT”入口。
   - 入口默认显示当前选中的主 AGENT 名称。
   - 用户点击后弹出可选菜单。

2. **用户可选范围**
   - 本轮可选 agent 严格限制为：
     - `TARA_analyst`
     - `ThreatIntelliganceCommander`

3. **用户选择行为**
   - 用户可以在菜单中切换当前要使用的主 AGENT。
   - 用户切换后，后续新发起的 run 应按该选择执行。

4. **adapter 协议扩展**
   - `RunStartRequest` 需要支持显式传递所选 agent 字段。
   - `start_run` 返回结果需要向前端回传最终生效的 selected agent 信息。
   - 前端与 adapter 之间需要形成“前端显式选择 → adapter 接收 → adapter 执行/确认 → adapter 回传”的闭环。

5. **默认值策略**
   - 当用户尚未主动选择时，系统需有明确默认值策略。
   - 默认策略应优先保证“可预测、可见、可解释”，即用户能够在 UI 中看到系统当前将使用哪个 agent，而不是依赖隐式 canonical remote agent 选择结果。

6. **架构流转约束**
   - 本需求先进入架构分析与任务拆分阶段，再分发开发；不得跳过架构环节直接要求开发实现。

### Out of Scope
1. 新增第三个或更多 agent。
2. 修改远端 `/agent` 能力发现机制本身。
3. 修改 canonical remote agent 发现算法本身，除非为兼容显式选择做必要适配。
4. 复杂权限、租户、RBAC、组织级 agent 策略。
5. 历史 run 的回溯重放与按历史 agent 重新执行。
6. 与 OpenCode Web 完全一致的样式复刻；本轮只要求交互模式对齐。
7. 模型级、提示词级或 agent 内部能力变更。

## User Stories / Usage Scenarios
1. **作为普通用户**
   - 我希望在 sidepanel 底部直接看到当前主 AGENT，
   - 这样我在发起任务前就知道消息会发给谁。

2. **作为普通用户**
   - 我希望点击当前主 AGENT 后可以从限定列表中切换，
   - 这样我能按当前任务场景主动选择 `TARA_analyst` 或 `ThreatIntelliganceCommander`。

3. **作为普通用户**
   - 我希望我选择的 AGENT 会在后续新 run 中被显式带给 adapter，
   - 这样系统不会继续因为默认 canonical 选择而偏离我的预期。

4. **作为前端/adapter 集成方**
   - 我希望 `start_run` 响应明确返回最终生效的 agent，
   - 这样前端可以准确展示实际执行结果，并处理前后端状态一致性。

5. **作为产品/架构负责人**
   - 我希望本需求先经过架构分析与拆分，
   - 这样开发接收到的是明确的模块边界、协议变更点与验收标准，而不是模糊指令。

## Acceptance Criteria
1. **当前主 AGENT 可见**
   - 打开 sidepanel 后，用户可在左下角看到一个显示当前主 AGENT 名称的按钮/入口。
   - 若当前已有选中值，则展示该值；若尚无用户显式选择，则展示默认生效值。

2. **可选范围受限**
   - 菜单中仅展示以下两个可选项：
     - `TARA_analyst`
     - `ThreatIntelliganceCommander`
   - 不允许展示其他通过远端发现到的 agent。

3. **可完成切换**
   - 用户点击按钮后可打开菜单并选择其中一个 agent。
   - 选择完成后，UI 上显示的当前主 AGENT 立即更新为用户新选择的值。

4. **请求显式透传**
   - 用户在选择 agent 后，后续新发起的 `RunStartRequest` 中包含显式 agent 字段。
   - 该字段值与 UI 当前显示的选中项一致。

5. **响应显式回传**
   - `start_run` 响应中包含 selected agent 信息。
   - 前端使用响应中的 selected agent 更新或确认显示状态。

6. **默认值策略明确**
   - 在用户首次使用、尚未显式选择 agent 的情况下，系统有定义清晰的默认 agent。
   - 该默认 agent 必须在 UI 中可见，而不是仅在 adapter 内部隐式决定。
   - 若本轮未新增额外配置来源，则默认值可基于产品预设或 adapter 返回值确定，但实现方案需在架构阶段落定并对前后端一致。

7. **新 run 生效边界明确**
   - agent 切换只要求对“切换后的新 run”生效。
   - 已经启动中的 run 不要求在本轮中途切换 agent。

8. **架构先行**
   - 该需求输出后需先进入架构师分析/拆分，不直接进入编码实施环节。

## Constraints
1. 必须基于当前已有 extension sidepanel 结构实现，已有 composer 区与底部 icon bar 是已知承载位置。
2. 必须兼容当前 python_adapter 已改为远端 `/agent` 能力发现的现状。
3. 必须补足当前缺失的协议字段：
   - `RunStartRequest.agent`
   - `start_run.selected_agent`（字段名可在架构阶段规范化，但语义必须保留）
4. 可选 agent 名单在本轮必须是固定白名单，不以远端发现结果直接驱动 UI 列表。
5. 本需求是产品需求 formalization，不包含代码实现方案与具体技术选型。

## Open Questions / Assumptions
### Assumptions
1. 本轮默认值策略按 **“有明确默认值且在 UI 可见”** 进行要求，但默认到底是固定预设某一项，还是首轮由 adapter/配置返回后前端展示，由架构阶段最终定稿。
2. 本轮默认不要求定义跨浏览器/跨设备同步策略。
3. 本轮默认不要求支持运行中动态切换 agent。
4. 本轮默认不要求开放白名单配置给终端用户自行编辑。

### Product Recommendation
为减少不可预测性，建议架构阶段优先评估以下默认值策略作为推荐基线：
- **推荐默认值：`TARA_analyst`**
- 理由：满足“默认可预测、可解释、可见”，同时避免继续依赖隐式 canonical remote agent 选择。
- 如果技术或业务上必须由 adapter 决定最终值，则前端仍必须在首次可见时展示该最终生效值，并在响应中确认。

## Risks
1. **前后端状态不一致风险**
   - 若前端展示值与 adapter 最终执行值不一致，会导致用户误判消息发送对象。

2. **默认值策略不清风险**
   - 若未在架构阶段定死默认优先级（前端预设 / adapter 返回 / 本地缓存），实现容易产生歧义。

3. **发现机制与白名单冲突风险**
   - 远端 `/agent` 发现结果可能与前端白名单不一致，需明确当目标 agent 不可用时的降级/报错规则。

4. **命名不一致风险**
   - `ThreatIntelliganceCommander` 命名看起来可能存在拼写历史包袱；若前后端、远端服务或 UI 文案不一致，容易导致协议错误。

5. **既有 run 生命周期边界风险**
   - 若未明确“仅新 run 生效”，开发可能误做成运行中切换，增加复杂度与缺陷概率。

6. **流程治理风险**
   - 若未遵守“先架构后开发”，开发可能在协议、状态管理、UI 交互未统一前直接修改，造成返工。

1. **当前主 AGENT 可见**
   - 打开 sidepanel 后，用户可在左下角看到一个显示当前主 AGENT 名称的按钮/入口。
   - 若当前已有选中值，则展示该值；若尚无用户显式选择，则展示默认生效值。

2. **可选范围受限**
   - 菜单中仅展示以下两个可选项：
     - `TARA_analyst`
     - `ThreatIntelliganceCommander`
   - 不允许展示其他通过远端发现到的 agent。

3. **可完成切换**
   - 用户点击按钮后可打开菜单并选择其中一个 agent。
   - 选择完成后，UI 上显示的当前主 AGENT 立即更新为用户新选择的值。

4. **请求显式透传**
   - 用户在选择 agent 后，后续新发起的 `RunStartRequest` 中包含显式 agent 字段。
   - 该字段值与 UI 当前显示的选中项一致。

5. **响应显式回传**
   - `start_run` 响应中包含 selected agent 信息。
   - 前端使用响应中的 selected agent 更新或确认显示状态。

6. **默认值策略明确**
   - 在用户首次使用、尚未显式选择 agent 的情况下，系统有定义清晰的默认 agent。
   - 该默认 agent 必须在 UI 中可见，而不是仅在 adapter 内部隐式决定。
   - 若本轮未新增额外配置来源，则默认值可基于产品预设或 adapter 返回值确定，但实现方案需在架构阶段落定并对前后端一致。

7. **新 run 生效边界明确**
   - agent 切换只要求对“切换后的新 run”生效。
   - 已经启动中的 run 不要求在本轮中途切换 agent。

8. **架构先行**
   - 该需求输出后需先进入架构师分析/拆分，不直接进入编码实施环节。

## Constraints
1. 必须基于当前已有 extension sidepanel 结构实现，已有 composer 区与底部 icon bar 是已知承载位置。
2. 必须兼容当前 python_adapter 已改为远端 `/agent` 能力发现的现状。
3. 必须补足当前缺失的协议字段：
   - `RunStartRequest.agent`
   - `start_run.selected_agent`（字段名可在架构阶段规范化，但语义必须保留）
4. 可选 agent 名单在本轮必须是固定白名单，不以远端发现结果直接驱动 UI 列表。
5. 本需求是产品需求 formalization，不包含代码实现方案与具体技术选型。

## Open Questions / Assumptions
### Assumptions
1. 本轮默认值策略按 **“有明确默认值且在 UI 可见”** 进行要求，但默认到底是固定预设某一项，还是首轮由 adapter/配置返回后前端展示，由架构阶段最终定稿。
2. 本轮默认不要求定义跨浏览器/跨设备同步策略。
3. 本轮默认不要求支持运行中动态切换 agent。
4. 本轮默认不要求开放白名单配置给终端用户自行编辑。

### Product Recommendation
为减少不可预测性，建议架构阶段优先评估以下默认值策略作为推荐基线：
- **推荐默认值：`TARA_analyst`**
- 理由：满足“默认可预测、可解释、可见”，同时避免继续依赖隐式 canonical remote agent 选择。
- 如果技术或业务上必须由 adapter 决定最终值，则前端仍必须在首次可见时展示该最终生效值，并在响应中确认。

## Risks
1. **前后端状态不一致风险**
   - 若前端展示值与 adapter 最终执行值不一致，会导致用户误判消息发送对象。

2. **默认值策略不清风险**
   - 若未在架构阶段定死默认优先级（前端预设 / adapter 返回 / 本地缓存），实现容易产生歧义。

3. **发现机制与白名单冲突风险**
   - 远端 `/agent` 发现结果可能与前端白名单不一致，需明确当目标 agent 不可用时的降级/报错规则。

4. **命名不一致风险**
   - `ThreatIntelliganceCommander` 命名看起来可能存在拼写历史包袱；若前后端、远端服务或 UI 文案不一致，容易导致协议错误。

5. **既有 run 生命周期边界风险**
   - 若未明确“仅新 run 生效”，开发可能误做成运行中切换，增加复杂度与缺陷概率。

6. **流程治理风险**
   - 若未遵守“先架构后开发”，开发可能在协议、状态管理、UI 交互未统一前直接修改，造成返工。

args.content: For ELM-004, the approved design introduces an explicit main-agent preference across extension sidepanel, shared protocol, background run orchestration, and python adapter selection logic. The UI must expose a lower-left main-agent entry anchored in the composer utility strip and allow only two logical agent IDs: TARA_analyst and ThreatIntelliganceCommander. The recommended baseline default is TARA_analyst, seeded visibly in extension state and persisted locally in chrome.storage.local so the current preference survives sidepanel close/reopen. Every new run must explicitly send the selected logical agent to the adapter; switching affects only future runs and does not mutate in-flight runs. The adapter must stop auto-selecting an implicit canonical analyst agent and instead resolve the requested logical agent against remote /agent discovery using a server-side whitelist plus alias normalization. On success, start_run returns the final effective logical selectedAgent (and may internally track resolved remote canonical agent separately). The UI list remains fixed by product whitelist and is never populated directly from discovery. If the requested agent is not allowed, reject with VALIDATION_ERROR; if discovery succeeds but the requested agent is unavailable remotely, fail the run start explicitly without silent fallback; if discovery transport/payload/runtime evidence fails, surface ANALYSIS_ERROR. Historical runs should record the effective agent so later UI views remain accurate after the user changes the future-run preference.

Rationale: silent fallback violates explicit user intent and makes the effective agent non-transparent.

Rationale: this preserves future-run preference across panel reloads and keeps historical runs attributable after later preference changes.

Rework must remove silent downgrade from explicit agent selection flow and update tests to require explicit failure instead of mock fallback.

args.title: Formal Requirement
args.content:
# Formal Requirement Draft

## Goal
将“sidepanel 主舞台中的 assistant 正文内容”和“THINKING / reasoning 内容”从当前的分离式双板块呈现，正式调整为**统一呈现导向**的产品需求，以便架构师基于该目标提出可审核的合并方案，而不是继续沿用“正文区 + 独立 THINKING 面板”的视觉结构。

## Scope
### In Scope
- 明确本轮需求目标：**不再把正文和 THINKING 分成两个独立视觉板块**。
- 约束架构分析方向：允许提出不同实现策略，但都必须围绕“统一呈现”。
- 覆盖当前 sidepanel 主舞台相关交互与展示逻辑的需求定义：
  - `reasoningTimeline.ts` 中 assistant 最终/流式消息携带 `processItems` 的现状
  - `reasoningTimelineView.tsx` 中 message 区与 `assistant-thinking-panel` 的分离展示现状
- 输出给架构师的分析前提、边界、验收标准与风险。

### Out of Scope
- 本轮不直接开发、不修改代码、不提交实现方案代码。
- 不在本轮锁定唯一 UI 方案或唯一技术实现路径。
- 不要求本轮定义所有视觉细节、样式细节、文案细节。
- 不扩展到 sidepanel 主舞台之外的其他页面/容器，除非架构分析证明存在强依赖。

## User Stories / Usage Scenarios
1. 作为产品审核者，我希望 assistant 的回答内容和 THINKING 不再以两个割裂的视觉板块出现，这样整体阅读体验更连贯，不会产生“正文已结束但旁边还有另一个面板”的割裂感。  
2. 作为架构师，我需要在“统一呈现”的明确目标下分析可选方案，例如内联折叠、时间线合流、同消息体分段展示等，以便输出可比较、可审核的架构方案。  
3. 作为后续开发者，我需要需求明确禁止继续保留“message 主正文 + 独立 assistant-thinking-panel”这一主视觉结构，以避免方案偏离产品目标。  

## Acceptance Criteria
1. 新需求必须明确写明：**正文与 THINKING 不应继续作为两个独立视觉板块呈现**。  
2. 架构阶段允许提出多个候选方案，但每个方案都必须满足以下约束：
   - 正文与 THINKING 属于**同一条 assistant 输出体验**；
   - 用户在主阅读流中看到的是**统一消息呈现**，而不是旁置或下置的独立第二面板；
   - 若存在折叠、展开、分段、标记、切换等机制，这些机制也必须是统一消息内部的呈现策略，而非独立容器策略。  
3. 架构分析产出中必须包含：
   - 当前分离式结构的问题说明；
   - 至少一种统一呈现策略；
   - 各候选策略对流式消息、最终消息、`processItems` 数据承载方式的影响分析；
   - 对现有 `assistant-thinking-panel` 是否移除、吸收或重构的判断。  
4. 后续进入设计/开发阶段时，任何仍保留“正文区 + 独立 THINKING 框”作为默认主方案的提案，都应视为**不满足该需求**。  
5. 本轮交付目标是“形成可供架构师分析并供用户审核的正式需求”，而不是直接进入实现。  

## Constraints
- 必须基于现有项目上下文：
  - `reasoningTimeline.ts` 中 assistant 消息包含 `processItems`
  - `reasoningTimelineView.tsx` 中当前存在独立 `assistant-thinking-panel`
- 需求目标是“统一呈现”，不是“隐藏 THINKING”或“删除 reasoning 数据”。
- 允许保留 THINKING 信息价值，但其展示方式必须被纳入统一消息体验。
- 本轮输出必须服务于“让架构师分析方案给用户审核”这一流程目标。

## Open Questions / Assumptions
### Assumptions
- 当前用户关切点主要是**视觉与交互层面的分离感**，而不是 `processItems` 数据本身是否保留。
- 架构师可以在不违背统一呈现目标的前提下，自由比较不同合并策略。
- 若统一呈现方案需要对消息数据结构、流式渲染路径或组件边界提出调整建议，可在架构分析中提出，但不属于本轮实现范围。

### Open Questions
- 暂未要求锁定 THINKING 在统一消息中的默认可见性策略（如默认展开、默认折叠、按阶段展开等），该部分可由架构师提出备选方案供审核。

# Formal Requirement Draft

## Goal
将“sidepanel 主舞台中的 assistant 正文内容”和“THINKING / reasoning 内容”从当前的分离式双板块呈现，正式调整为**统一呈现导向**的产品需求，以便架构师基于该目标提出可审核的合并方案，而不是继续沿用“正文区 + 独立 THINKING 面板”的视觉结构。

## Scope
### In Scope
- 明确本轮需求目标：**不再把正文和 THINKING 分成两个独立视觉板块**。
- 约束架构分析方向：允许提出不同实现策略，但都必须围绕“统一呈现”。
- 覆盖当前 sidepanel 主舞台相关交互与展示逻辑的需求定义：
  - `reasoningTimeline.ts` 中 assistant 最终/流式消息携带 `processItems` 的现状
  - `reasoningTimelineView.tsx` 中 message 区与 `assistant-thinking-panel` 的分离展示现状
- 输出给架构师的分析前提、边界、验收标准与风险。

### Out of Scope
- 本轮不直接开发、不修改代码、不提交实现方案代码。
- 不在本轮锁定唯一 UI 方案或唯一技术实现路径。
- 不要求本轮定义所有视觉细节、样式细节、文案细节。
- 不扩展到 sidepanel 主舞台之外的其他页面/容器，除非架构分析证明存在强依赖。

## User Stories / Usage Scenarios
1. 作为产品审核者，我希望 assistant 的回答内容和 THINKING 不再以两个割裂的视觉板块出现，这样整体阅读体验更连贯，不会产生“正文已结束但旁边还有另一个面板”的割裂感。

3. 作为后续开发者，我需要需求明确禁止继续保留“message 主正文 + 独立 assistant-thinking-panel”这一主视觉结构，以避免方案偏离产品目标。  

## Acceptance Criteria
1. 新需求必须明确写明：**正文与 THINKING 不应继续作为两个独立视觉板块呈现**。  
2. 架构阶段允许提出多个候选方案，但每个方案都必须满足以下约束：
   - 正文与 THINKING 属于**同一条 assistant 输出体验**；
   - 用户在主阅读流中看到的是**统一消息呈现**，而不是旁置或下置的独立第二面板；
   - 若存在折叠、展开、分段、标记、切换等机制，这些机制也必须是统一消息内部的呈现策略，而非独立容器策略。  
3. 架构分析产出中必须包含：
   - 当前分离式结构的问题说明；
   - 至少一种统一呈现策略；
   - 各候选策略对流式消息、最终消息、`processItems` 数据承载方式的影响分析；
   - 对现有 `assistant-thinking-panel` 是否移除、吸收或重构的判断。  
4. 后续进入设计/开发阶段时，任何仍保留“正文区 + 独立 THINKING 框”作为默认主方案的提案，都应视为**不满足该需求**。  
5. 本轮交付目标是“形成可供架构师分析并供用户审核的正式需求”，而不是直接进入实现。  

## Constraints
- 必须基于现有项目上下文：
  - `reasoningTimeline.ts` 中 assistant 消息包含 `processItems`
  - `reasoningTimelineView.tsx` 中当前存在独立 `assistant-thinking-panel`
- 需求目标是“统一呈现”，不是“隐藏 THINKING”或“删除 reasoning 数据”。
- 允许保留 THINKING 信息价值，但其展示方式必须被纳入统一消息体验。
- 本轮输出必须服务于“让架构师分析方案给用户审核”这一流程目标。

## Open Questions / Assumptions
### Assumptions
- 当前用户关切点主要是**视觉与交互层面的分离感**，而不是 `processItems` 数据本身是否保留。
- 架构师可以在不违背统一呈现目标的前提下，自由比较不同合并策略。
- 若统一呈现方案需要对消息数据结构、流式渲染路径或组件边界提出调整建议，可在架构分析中提出，但不属于本轮实现范围。

### Open Questions
- 暂未要求锁定 THINKING 在统一消息中的默认可见性策略（如默认展开、默认折叠、按阶段展开等），该部分可由架构师提出备选方案供审核。

args.content: For ELM-005 and TASK-044, the approved design replaces the separate assistant-thinking-panel with a unified assistant bubble pattern. The assistant message remains a single ChatStreamItemModel, and THINKING is rendered as an inline collapsible section placed before the assistant body inside the same conversation bubble. During streaming, the inline THINKING section is visible within the same bubble and defaults to expanded when visible reasoning exists, preserving live process awareness without creating a second panel. In the final result state, the inline THINKING section remains available but defaults to collapsed while preserving full expandable content. The Reasoning Projection Mapper owns derivation of thinking display metadata from processItems so the renderer consumes a stable view model instead of recomputing thinking-specific rules ad hoc.

During streaming, the inline THINKING section is visible within the same bubble and defaults to expanded when visible reasoning exists, preserving live process awareness without creating a second panel. In the final result state, the inline THINKING section remains available but defaults to collapsed while preserving full expandable content. The Reasoning Projection Mapper owns derivation of thinking display metadata from processItems so the renderer consumes a stable view model instead of recomputing thinking-specific rules ad hoc.

args.content: Decision: Extend existing software unit ELM-APP-EXT-RUN-CONVERSATION-MAPPER in extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts instead of introducing a new message data model. Rationale: processItems already attaches THINKING to the same assistant item, so the architecture should preserve that ownership and add derived inline-thinking presentation metadata rather than split THINKING into a separate stream item or independent panel model.

args.content: Decision: Use final-state collapsed by default and streaming-state expanded by default for the inline THINKING section when visible thinking content exists. Rationale: streaming needs live process transparency, while final answers should prioritize the main response and reduce visual competition after completion.

args.content: REQ-SP-UNIFIED-SEQUENTIAL-AI-OUTPUT approved architecture direction: sidepanel main stage must stop using THINKING vs body classification as the structural driver. Replace the current assistantDisplayText + processItems + assistant_progress/assistant_result projection with a unified sequential read model driven by AI output order. Event kinds such as thinking, result, tool_call, question, and error remain as auxiliary metadata only. Streaming and final states must share one read model so the UI transitions by status mutation rather than structural remapping. reasoningTimeline.ts becomes the sequential mapper boundary; reasoningTimelineView.tsx becomes a thin renderer over ordered display units without a separate thinking panel.

result.designSummary: REQ-SP-UNIFIED-SEQUENTIAL-AI-OUTPUT approved architecture direction: sidepanel main stage must stop using THINKING vs body classification as the structural driver. Replace the current assistantDisplayText + processItems + assistant_progress/assistant_result projection with a unified sequential read model driven by AI output order. Event kinds such as thinking, result, tool_call, question, and error remain as auxiliary metadata only. Streaming and final states must share one read model so the UI transitions by status mutation rather than structural remapping. reasoningTimeline.ts becomes the sequential mapper boundary; reasoningTimelineView.tsx becomes a thin renderer over ordered display units without a separate thinking panel.

args.content: Decision: Reject the prior scheme that rendered THINKING as a separate primary structure or as inline folding inside the assistant bubble. Rationale: the repository shows current logic depends on heuristic derivation (assistantDisplayText, processItems, synthetic thinking, visibility trimming, assistant_progress vs assistant_result), which cannot reliably distinguish reasoning from answer text when event semantics are noisy, cumulative, or delayed.

decisions: Decision: Reject the prior scheme that rendered THINKING as a separate primary structure or as inline folding inside the assistant bubble. Rationale: the repository shows current logic depends on heuristic derivation (assistantDisplayText, processItems, synthetic thinking, visibility trimming, assistant_progress vs assistant_result), which cannot reliably distinguish reasoning from answer text when event semantics are noisy, cumulative, or delayed.

args.content: Decision: Recommended solution is a fragment-sequence read model for the sidepanel main stage. Rationale: message-fragment style ordered units preserve true emission order, allow streaming and final states to converge on one model, and minimize renderer branching while still retaining event classification as badges/metadata for tooling, question UX, retry, feedback, and diagnostics.

Decision: Recommended solution is a fragment-sequence read model for the sidepanel main stage. Rationale: message-fragment style ordered units preserve true emission order, allow streaming and final states to converge on one model, and minimize renderer branching while still retaining event classification as badges/metadata for tooling, question UX, retry, feedback, and diagnostics.

args.content: Decision: Fragment identity and merge are confined to a single run and a logical output key. Assistant output fragments merge by semantic.messageId, semantic.identity, or data.message_id when present; otherwise they fall back to one active assistant-output stream key per run. Question fragments merge by questionId, user answers by answer id, errors by terminal emission key, and process/tool fragments by adjacent same-kind stream identity only. Final result events must converge into the existing assistant-output fragment instead of replacing the structure.

Question fragments merge by questionId, user answers by answer id, errors by terminal emission key, and process/tool fragments by adjacent same-kind stream identity only. The sidepanel main stage read model is now fragment-first, sequence-driven, and shared by live and history rendering. reasoningTimeline.ts owns fragment construction and merge logic; reasoningTimelineView.tsx owns thin ordered rendering; controller and MainStage only pass run segments and interaction handlers.

args.content: Approved detailed design for REQ-SP-UNIFIED-SEQUENTIAL-AI-OUTPUT: adopt a Fragment Sequence Read Model in the sidepanel main stage. The mapper produces ordered fragments for user prompt, assistant output, assistant process/tool traces, questions, user answers, and errors, with stable per-run fragment identity and merge rules. Existing event types remain as metadata only. Live and history runs share one fragment pipeline. Interaction affordances bind to fragment or fragment-group anchors rather than assistant_result/processItems assumptions. Implementation scope is decomposed into mapper, renderer, live-history integration, and interaction/test migration tasks TASK-050 through TASK-054.

args.content: Audit passed for REQ-SP-UNIFIED-SEQUENTIAL-AI-OUTPUT on commit e8283c2e02e8d2b1812eb48ab4c9aed5d81fc2fb. reasoningTimeline.ts implements a fragment-first sequence mapper with assistant_output as the unified output fragment, streaming and final result convergence on the same anchor/group anchor, and interaction capabilities bound to fragment anchors instead of assistant_result assumptions. reasoningTimelineView.tsx renders ordered fragments without a dedicated Thinking panel, exposes fragment/group anchor attributes, and routes copy/feedback/retry/question submit through fragment-backed item contracts. Live and history both project through buildChatStreamItems/buildFragmentSequence, and contract tests cover streaming/final convergence, no Thinking panel path, shared live/history mapping, and fragment-group interaction anchoring. Explicit ArchitectureID evidence exists for ELM-APP-EXT-RUN-CONVERSATION-MAPPER, ELM-APP-EXT-CONVERSATION-RENDERER, and ELM-APP-EXT-CONVERSATION-LIVE-HISTORY-UX.

args.content: Approved architecture baseline for REQ-SIDEPANEL-OPENCODE-WEB-CHAT-EXACT-PARITY: extension/src/sidepanel conversation experience must adopt OpenCode Web Share.tsx as the primary transcript contract. Sidepanel must shift from fragment-card/event-first rendering to message-plus-parts rendering, with Share-compatible part filtering, follow-up suspension/resume flow, bottom summary, and bottom-attention behavior. Extension-specific entrypoints such as permissions, sessions, rules, run drawer, header, dropdown, and spotlight must be relegated to host-adapter roles that do not alter transcript semantics.

result.designSummary: Approved architecture baseline for REQ-SIDEPANEL-OPENCODE-WEB-CHAT-EXACT-PARITY: extension/src/sidepanel conversation experience must adopt OpenCode Web Share.tsx as the primary transcript contract. Sidepanel must shift from fragment-card/event-first rendering to message-plus-parts rendering, with Share-compatible part filtering, follow-up suspension/resume flow, bottom summary, and bottom-attention behavior. Extension-specific entrypoints such as permissions, sessions, rules, run drawer, header, dropdown, and spotlight must be relegated to host-adapter roles that do not alter transcript semantics.

args.content: Decision: For exact parity, sidepanel transcript semantics are re-baselined on OpenCode Web Share.tsx and share/part.tsx, not on the existing reasoningTimeline fragment sequence. Existing fragment models may remain internal projection helpers only; they are not the final UI contract.

decisions: Decision: For exact parity, sidepanel transcript semantics are re-baselined on OpenCode Web Share.tsx and share/part.tsx, not on the existing reasoningTimeline fragment sequence. Existing fragment models may remain internal projection helpers only; they are not the final UI contract.

args.content: Decision: Share.tsx part visibility rules are authoritative for transcript rendering. Hidden-by-default categories include snapshot, patch, step-finish, non-initial step-start, synthetic text, empty text, and pending/running tool parts. Sidepanel-specific sanitization may only normalize inputs into this contract and must not invent new visible semantics.

args.content: Decision: Follow-up questions are modeled as transcript suspension points inside the same conversation stream, not as a separate sidepanel workbench mode. Header, dropdown, spotlight, sessions, context, rules, and run entrypoints are constrained to host adaptation roles outside the transcript core.

args.content: Decision: Implementation decomposition for REQ-SIDEPANEL-OPENCODE-WEB-CHAT-EXACT-PARITY is anchored to extension/src/sidepanel, specifically reasoningTimeline.ts, reasoningTimelineView.tsx, useSidepanelController.ts, App.tsx, MainStage.tsx, Composer.tsx, ShellHeader.tsx, useRunHistory.ts, questionState.ts, and existing sidepanel tests. The python_adapter remains an upstream event source and is rejected as the ownership boundary for transcript parity because the approved baseline is a sidepanel UI contract aligned to OpenCode Web Share.tsx.

tasks.title: Rebuild sidepanel transcript projection to OpenCode Web message-part contract
tasks.summary: Refactor extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts and questionState.ts so sidepanel display data is emitted as OpenCode-compatible messages and parts semantics. Treat existing fragment, runEvents, and history models as internal projection inputs only. Enforce Share.tsx-aligned part typing, follow-up suspension and resume ordering, and hidden-part filtering preconditions.

tasks.title: Replace turn-card transcript rendering with Share-compatible part renderer
tasks.summary: Refactor extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx so the main stage renders OpenCode-style message and part output instead of conversation turn cards. Align transcript structure, part decoration, anchor and copy behavior, visible part ordering, scroll button behavior, and transcript-tail summary placement to Share.tsx and share.module.css semantics. Remove final UI dependence on role labels and status chips.

tasks.title: Unify live run, history, and follow-up continuity under one transcript contract
tasks.summary: Refactor extension/src/sidepanel/useSidepanelController.ts and useRunHistory.ts so current run, historical segments, and question-answer continuation all feed the same message-part transcript contract. Ensure live and history sessions share the same rendering protocol, and follow-up answers resume the transcript in place rather than producing sidepanel-specific workbench flows.

tasks.title: Demote shell and stage chrome to host-adapter roles around the transcript core
tasks.summary: Refactor extension/src/sidepanel/App.tsx, components/stage/MainStage.tsx, and components/shell/ShellHeader.tsx so header, drawer host, and stage framing no longer define the conversation semantics. Move run status expression into the transcript-tail summary, keep only approved host-adapter entrypoints outside the transcript core, and preserve only the explicitly allowed sidepanel adaptations.

tasks.title: Align composer and question answering to transcript pause-resume behavior
tasks.summary: Refactor extension/src/sidepanel/components/composer/Composer.tsx and controller integration so the bottom composer behaves as the transcript input surface for both new prompts and waiting follow-up answers. Remove role-name-led messaging, keep question response flow inside the transcript contract, and prevent composer utilities from reintroducing workbench-style conversation semantics.

tasks.title: Add parity regression coverage for OpenCode transcript contract and allowed adaptations
tasks.summary: Expand extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.test.ts, App.test.tsx, and related tests to lock the approved contract: message-part projection, hidden-part rules, transcript-tail summary, role-label removal, in-transcript follow-up pause and resume, live-history consistency, and the limited unavoidable sidepanel adaptations only.

args.content: QA failed for commit d8dc8ae. args.content: Audit resolution: Rework required. The approved parity baseline forbids visible role names or explicit role markers inside the transcript. Visible avatar text markers such as AI, 你, ?, and ! are design violations even if You and Assistant labels were removed. The minimal correction path is limited to transcript renderer presentation and parity test coverage; do not expand scope beyond TASK-058 and TASK-062.

decisions: Decision: For exact parity, sidepanel transcript semantics are re-baselined on OpenCode Web Share.tsx and share/part.tsx, not on the existing reasoningTimeline fragment sequence. Existing fragment models may remain internal projection helpers only; they are not the final UI contract.

Decision: Share.tsx part visibility rules are authoritative for transcript rendering. Hidden-by-default categories include snapshot, patch, step-finish, non-initial step-start, synthetic text, empty text, and pending/running tool parts. Sidepanel-specific sanitization may only normalize inputs into this contract and must not invent new visible semantics.

Decision: Follow-up questions are modeled as transcript suspension points inside the same conversation stream, not as a separate sidepanel workbench mode. Header, dropdown, spotlight, sessions, context, rules, and run entrypoints are constrained to host adaptation roles outside the transcript core.

Decision: Implementation decomposition for REQ-SIDEPANEL-OPENCODE-WEB-CHAT-EXACT-PARITY is anchored to extension/src/sidepanel, specifically reasoningTimeline.ts, reasoningTimelineView.tsx, useSidepanelController.ts, App.tsx, MainStage.tsx, Composer.tsx, ShellHeader.tsx, useRunHistory.ts, questionState.ts, and existing sidepanel tests. The python_adapter remains an upstream event source and is rejected as the ownership boundary for transcript parity because the approved baseline is a sidepanel UI contract aligned to OpenCode Web Share.tsx.

args.content: 最小纠偏方案：将 sidepanel transcript 的角色对齐问题限定在 renderer + transcript.css 边界内处理，基于现有 data-message-role / TranscriptMessageModel.role 为 user 提供右对齐、assistant 提供左对齐的 OpenCode Web 风格布局；将 AI 增量打印问题限定在 reasoningTimelineView.tsx 的展示层处理，停用 assistant 正文上的 useBufferedTypewriter 本地补帧逻辑，正文仅跟随 reasoningTimeline.ts 已聚合出的真实流事件文本更新；保留非内容性 streaming indicator，但禁止任何再次改变正文顺序或节奏的本地逐字动画。

result.designSummary: 最小纠偏方案：将 sidepanel transcript 的角色对齐问题限定在 renderer + transcript.css 边界内处理，基于现有 data-message-role / TranscriptMessageModel.role 为 user 提供右对齐、assistant 提供左对齐的 OpenCode Web 风格布局；将 AI 增量打印问题限定在 reasoningTimelineView.tsx 的展示层处理，停用 assistant 正文上的 useBufferedTypewriter 本地补帧逻辑，正文仅跟随 reasoningTimeline.ts 已聚合出的真实流事件文本更新；保留非内容性 streaming indicator，但禁止任何再次改变正文顺序或节奏的本地逐字动画。

args.content: Decision: user 右对齐 / assistant 左对齐属于 ELM-APP-EXT-CONVERSATION-RENDERER 与 ELM-APP-EXT-SIDEPANEL-DESIGN-SYSTEM 的共同职责边界。理由：reasoningTimelineView.tsx 已暴露 data-message-role 与 TranscriptMessageModel.role，问题是样式兑现缺失，而非 transcript 数据模型缺失。

args.content: Decision: assistant 正文不得继续使用 useBufferedTypewriter 之类本地 buffered/typewriter 补帧逻辑。理由：reasoningTimeline.ts 已是 assistant 增量/快照顺序与文本聚合的真实来源；view 层再次补帧会篡改用户感知到的到达顺序与打印节奏，违背 OpenCode Web 映射要求。

Decision: assistant 正文不得继续使用 useBufferedTypewriter 之类本地 buffered/typewriter 补帧逻辑。理由：reasoningTimeline.ts 已是 assistant 增量/快照顺序与文本聚合的真实来源；view 层再次补帧会篡改用户感知到的到达顺序与打印节奏，违背 OpenCode Web 映射要求。

args.content: Decision: 最小改动不修改 reasoningTimeline.ts 的核心聚合策略，先在 reasoningTimelineView.tsx 与 transcript.css 内完成纠偏，并以 App.test.tsx / reasoningTimeline.test.ts 锁定行为。理由：当前差异证据集中在展示层与样式层，扩大到映射层会增加无必要风险。

args.content: Audit passed for commit 52dc9f5270af5fc28c32266cdcc216d03d2140ec across TASK-073,TASK-074,TASK-075,TASK-076,TASK-077. reasoningTimeline.ts now projects tool activity as assistant-internal transcript parts grouped with assistant output instead of standalone tool message blocks; thinking/reasoning fragments are dropped from the default visible transcript path; the generic streaming copy '正在继续…' is emitted only as inline status outside transcript body when no assistant text exists; resolveAssistantDisplayText plus mergeStateUpdate preserve newer live assistant body text over stale same-run finalOutput/history payloads; and App.test.tsx plus reasoningTimeline.test.ts were updated to the new message+parts baseline covering inline tool parts, hidden reasoning, split follow-up assistant segments, no generic streaming body text, and stale-finalOutput regression protection.

tasks.title: Rebaseline sidepanel transcript projection to source-ordered flat part stream
tasks.summary: Refactor the transcript projection contract to match OpenCode Web Share references (`packages/web/src/components/Share.tsx`, `packages/web/src/components/share/part.tsx`, `packages/web/src/components/share/common.tsx`, `packages/web/src/components/share.module.css`) by making source-ordered `message.parts` the only visible transcript baseline, replacing event/fragment/chat-card semantics with a flat part stream, enforcing typed visibility filtering, preserving original source part order without post-loop append or segment rebasing, expressing follow-up as same-stream suspension/resume, and emitting summary/status only as a tail summary part.
tasks.details: Developer input: use the OpenCode Web Share implementation files as the contract reference. Scope is limited to transcript projection logic in `extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.ts`. Remove heuristics that infer body text from reasoning or regex cleanup, eliminate synthetic regrouping that changes visible order, and make live/history/follow-up projection converge on the same source-ordered parts contract.

tasks.title: Replace card-based transcript rendering with Share-style flat part renderer
tasks.summary: Rework the sidepanel renderer against OpenCode Web Share references (`packages/web/src/components/Share.tsx`, `packages/web/src/components/share/part.tsx`, `packages/web/src/components/share/common.tsx`, `packages/web/src/components/share.module.css`) so the UI no longer uses `TranscriptMessageCard` or message-level chat card shells. Render a flat Share-style part stream, remove generic part header/badge/timestamp noise unless explicitly present in the reference contract, and downgrade copy/retry/feedback actions from message hover bar behavior to local part decoration/footer semantics.
tasks.details: Developer input: use the OpenCode Web Share implementation files as the rendering contract. Scope is `extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx`. The result must not preserve chat-card wrappers, message hover bars, or generalized metadata chrome that does not exist in the reference implementation.

tasks.title: Align sidepanel transcript CSS to unified vertical part-stream skeleton
tasks.summary: Rebuild transcript styling to follow the OpenCode Web Share CSS skeleton from `packages/web/src/components/share.module.css`: a unified vertical part stream rather than user/assistant bubble shells. Remove left/right chat bubble framing, message-hover action affordances, and generic transcript chrome; retain only metadata expressions that truly exist in the reference Share contract.
tasks.details: Developer input: use `packages/web/src/components/share.module.css` as the styling baseline and reconcile the current `extension/src/sidepanel/style/transcript.css` to that structure. The CSS outcome must support the renderer’s flat part stream and no longer depend on role-based chat card shells.

tasks.title: Converge sidepanel live/history shell integration on single transcript-stream contract
tasks.summary: Update the sidepanel shell integration so live view, history view, and follow-up continuation all consume the same OpenCode Web Share-style transcript contract, with summary/status rendered only as the transcript tail summary part. Use the Share reference files (`packages/web/src/components/Share.tsx`, `packages/web/src/components/share/part.tsx`, `packages/web/src/components/share/common.tsx`, `packages/web/src/components/share.module.css`) as the acceptance baseline and remove feed-external footer or top-level standalone status rows for transcript state.
tasks.details: Developer input: primary scope is `extension/src/sidepanel/components/stage/MainStage.tsx`, with any necessary coordination in sidepanel state/history boundaries that currently preserve split run segments or out-of-band transcript status presentation. The shell must not reintroduce summary/footer/status UI outside the transcript stream.

tasks.title: Rebaseline transcript tests to Share reference contract
tasks.summary: Replace protective tests for the custom sidepanel transcript implementation with reference-based contract tests derived from OpenCode Web Share (`packages/web/src/components/Share.tsx`, `packages/web/src/components/share/part.tsx`, `packages/web/src/components/share/common.tsx`, `packages/web/src/components/share.module.css`). Cover source-ordered visible parts, typed filtering, flat part rendering, same-stream follow-up suspension/resume, transcript-tail summary part, absence of chat-card/header/timestamp noise, and CSS/layout expectations that match the new Share-style skeleton.
tasks.details: Developer input: update `extension/src/sidepanel/App.test.tsx` and `extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimeline.test.ts` to assert the approved contract rather than current implementation details. Tests must fail if the sidepanel falls back to fragment rebasing, message hover bars, feed-external summary/status, or synthetic follow-up turn splitting.

args.content: AuditGapResolution: ReworkRequired for TASK-088 only. The approved transcript contract requires all transcript status and summary semantics to appear exclusively as the tail summary part inside the transcript stream. The remaining `conversation-inline-status` / `inlineStatusCopy` / `GENERIC_STREAMING_COPY` path in `extension/src/sidepanel/reasoningTimelineView.tsx` is an out-of-band status surface and violates that contract. Minimal corrective path: keep the existing Share-style transcript baseline and do not widen decomposition; remove or neutralize the external inline-status render path, route streaming/waiting/completed state expression exclusively through the transcript tail summary part already derived from transcript state, and add regression coverage that no feed-external status node is rendered for active/live/history transcript states. Preserve retry history by reworking TASK-088 rather than creating new task IDs.
